name: Konkan Railway – Helper, Technician and Other – 132 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Konkan Railway Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 132 Helper, Technician and Other Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Recruitment 2026 for 132 posts of Helper, Technician and Other Posts. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, ITI, 10TH Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 08-06-2026, and ends on 12-06-2026. For detailed information please visit Konkan Railway official website, konkanrailway.com.
basic_details.application_mode: Walk-in Interview (with filled application form in prescribed format – Annexure-A)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview (Group Discussion/Written Test may be introduced as elimination round depending on number of candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria may report directly for the walk-in interview at the venue on the specified date and time for their respective post. Candidates must fill and bring one copy of the application in the prescribed format (Annexure-A attached with the notification), available on the KRCL website at www.konkanrailway.com under Recruitment > Current Notifications. No online or offline application submission by post/courier is required – candidates must appear in person.
